name: Authorization - Notion Docs

name: Authentication - Notion Docs
snippet: Requests use the HTTP Authorization header to both authenticate and authorize operations. The Notion API accepts bearer tokens in this header.

name: Create a token - Notion Docs
snippet: Creates an access token that a third-party service can use to authenticate with Notion.
